calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-08-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-08-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

David G. Mendez, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Balwant D. Thakor, who was not present at today's hearing.
Gopal Sahah, plaintiff's Residence Manager, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Malda Saadet Erol.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on November 17, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Three Day Notice to Vacate dated 10/31/08--------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Balwant D. Thakor, and against defendant Melda Saadet Erol as follows:

Plaintiff Balwant D. Thakor shall recover from defendant Melda Saadet Erol Holdover Damages in the amount of $818.00, and costs in the amount of $230.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $1,048.00.

Additionally, plaintiff Balwant D. Thakor is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 608 O'Farrell Street, #63, San Francisco, CA 94109-7404. The rental agreement is conceled.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibit.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2008 Off Calendar
